
        INSERT INTO dara_mallas_study_plan
            (
                program_id,
                period_id,
                description,
                grade_id,
                banner_grade_id,
                with_students,
                study_plan_class_id,
                area_id,
                graduation_profile,
                graduation_profile_en,
                state,
                file_name,
                plan_template_file_name,
                prerequisite_file_name,
                corequisite_file_name,
                homologation_file_name,
                campus_id,
                hours_max,
                hours_min,
                coordinator_id,
                mallas_web,
                sniese_program_id,
                redesign_code_id,
                study_plan_stop,
                historic_file_name,
                company_id,
                total_credits,
                total_hours
            )
            SELECT
                p.id AS program_id,
                per.id AS period_id,
                NULL,
                g.id AS grade_id,
                bg.id AS banner_grade_id,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                c.id AS campus_id,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                3,
                NULL,
                NULL
            FROM dara_mallas_program p
            JOIN dara_mallas_program_code pc
                ON pc.program_id = p.id
                AND pc.name = 'ULAT3P605'
                AND pc.company_id = 3
            JOIN dara_mallas_period per
                ON per.name = '000000'
                AND per.company_id = 3
            JOIN dara_mallas_grade g
                ON g.description = 'TN'
                AND g.company_id = 3
            JOIN dara_mallas_banner_grade bg
                ON bg.code = 'CR'
                AND bg.company_id = 3
            JOIN dara_mallas_campus c
                ON c.code = 'SP'
                AND c.company_id = 3
            WHERE p.period_id = per.id
            AND p.company_id = 3;

                banner_grade_id,
                with_students,
                study_plan_class_id,
                area_id,
                graduation_profile,
                graduation_profile_en,
                state,
                file_name,
                plan_template_file_name,
                prerequisite_file_name,
                corequisite_file_name,
                homologation_file_name,
                campus_id,
                hours_max,
                hours_min,
                coordinator_id,
                mallas_web,
                sniese_program_id,
                redesign_code_id,
                study_plan_stop,
                historic_file_name,
                company_id,
                total_credits,
                total_hours
            )
            SELECT
                p.id AS program_id,
                per.id AS period_id,
                NULL,
                g.id AS grade_id,
                bg.id AS banner_grade_id,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                c.id AS campus_id,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                NULL,
                3,
                NULL,
                NULL
            FROM dara_mallas_program p
            JOIN dara_mallas_program_code pc
                ON pc.program_id = p.id
                AND pc.name = 'ULAT2A465'
                AND pc.company_id = 3
            JOIN dara_mallas_period per
                ON per.name = '000000'
                AND per.company_id = 3
            JOIN dara_mallas_grade g
                ON g.description = 'GR'
                AND g.company_id = 3
            JOIN dara_mallas_banner_grade bg
                ON bg.code = 'MA'
                AND bg.company_id = 3
            JOIN dara_mallas_campus c
                ON c.code = 'HR'
                AND c.company_id = 3
            WHERE p.period_id = per.id
            AND p.company_id = 3;

            (
                program_id,
                period_id,
                description,
                grade_id,

                mallas_web,
                sniese_program_id,
                redesign_code_id,
                study_plan_stop,
                historic_file_name,
                company_id,
                total_credits,

            )
